    "R1.1": "The artifact has a conceptual reconstruction issue with the overuse of 'which' clauses and unclear framing.",

    "R1.4": "The artifact lacks clear novelty positioning, as it does not contrast with nearest-neighbor studies or provide a rhetorical delta.",

rationale.R1.1: The artifact has a conceptual reconstruction issue with the overuse of 'which' clauses and unclear framing.
rationale.R1.2: There are logical consistency issues due to the repetitive use of 'which we believe', which may imply subjective rather than objective reasoning.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact lacks clear novelty positioning, as it does not contrast with nearest-neighbor studies or provide a rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.5: The artifact has structural reorganization issues with long, run-on sentences and unclear section boundaries.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation specifically requests polishing of the writing, which includes addressing sentence-level prose issues.
